[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100000 1
1 00100001 2
2 00000001 1
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00101000 2
7 10010000 2

73 10010000 2 match 7
